verdict_obj.summary: The added lemma `two_pos` is explicitly described as a throwaway harness exercise with no stated roadmap target. It duplicates trivially provable arithmetic facts already in Mathlib and has no path to any roadmap node.

findings.issue: `two_pos` is self-described as a throwaway lemma with no roadmap target and no prerequisite role; it is off-roadmap material.
findings.fix: Remove the lemma, or add it to the roadmap first and cite the target in the PR description.
findings.evidence: PR diff docstring: 'A throwaway lemma, used only to exercise the review harness.' No roadmap file or node is cited anywhere in the PR.
